_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: to be frank with you

sentences.en: This is work, by the way, my little travel bookshop,
sentences.ko: 그리고 여긴 내 일터 — 작은 여행 서점이야.

sentences.en: ★ which, um, well, sells travel books, and to be frank with you, doesn't always sell many of those.
sentences.ko: ★ 여행 책을 파는 곳인데, 솔직히 말하면, 늘 많이 팔리진 않아.
